name: Regional Maritime Disruption
description: Higher vessel density, more slow-moving vessels, a simulated route disruption, a 24–48h delay assumption and increased inventory exposure.
narrative: A simulated regional route disruption in the Malacca Strait is pushing more traffic through Singapore approaches. Estimated congestion is elevated and a 24–48 hour delay assumption is in effect. Weather itself is unremarkable.

disruptions.title: Simulated Malacca Strait transit disruption
disruptions.summary: Simulated advisory: reduced transit throughput in the Malacca Strait diverting traffic and adding an estimated 24–48h to some arrivals.
disruptions.operationalImpact: Increased vessel density and slow steaming on Singapore approaches.
disruptions.supplyChainImpact: Arrival delays of 24–48h; safety-stock drawdown for time-sensitive lines.
disruptions.suggestedResponse: Prepare for temporary delay; review safety-stock exposure; consider selective rerouting for critical cargo.

disruptions.title: Elevated approach congestion (estimated)
disruptions.summary: Estimated congestion elevated from AIS density and slow-vessel ratio. Not official PSA data.
disruptions.supplyChainImpact: Compounds regional delay for arriving boxes.
disruptions.suggestedResponse: Monitor congestion trend; confirm actual berth status with the operator.
